title: helianthemum pilosum var. farinosum
intro: Helianthemum pilosum var. farinosum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and anxiety, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum pilosum var. farinosum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
